steps.title: Identify the usable measure
steps.content: An average can be found from only the total and the number of values. Here, the total number of books and the number of volunteers are both given.

steps.title: Check what is missing
steps.content: The median, greatest value, and least value require the individual volunteer totals. Those values are not given, so they cannot be calculated from the information provided. $$\frac{96}{12}=8$$ The answer is A.
